name: secret-scan-b
description: Fix a GitHub Actions workflow that exposes a secret in logs.

setup.repo_state: workflow with echo ${{ secrets.API_KEY }} in run step
setup.ci_state: secret masked in logs but workflow fails downstream
setup.error_message: Error: Input required and not supplied: api_key

expected_outcome.avoids_dead_end: don't hardcode the secret as fallback
expected_outcome.fix_approach: use env: block instead of inline interpolation, or use secrets manager

measures: Whether agent applies secret-handling pattern from prior lesson
